plan:
- Control via ESP32-S3 MCU for image processing and thermal management of the reagent reaction zone.
- Optical system using a polarized camera module and white LED array with a frosted diffuser for uniform illumination.
- Motorized sample delivery system using a NEMA 17 stepper motor and T8 lead screw for precise positioning of the dipstick tray.
- Integrated sensing via SHT31 humidity/temp sensor, BH1750 ambient light sensor, and NTC thermistor for closed-loop environmental control.
- Power system including a 3.7V LiPo battery, USB-C charging module, and high-efficiency buck-boost regulators for 5V and 9V rails.
- Mechanical assembly utilizing an injection-molded or 3D-printed enclosure base, a motorized tray with flocking material, and a UV-C sterilization module.

nodes.name: Home Limit Switch
nodes.description: Mechanical switch for manual touch-off height sensing.

nodes.name: End Limit Switch
nodes.description: Mechanical switch for manual touch-off height sensing.

nodes.name: Environmental Sensor
nodes.description: High-accuracy digital temperature and humidity sensor with I2C interface for high sensitivity.

nodes.name: System Battery
nodes.description: Main power source for the device.

nodes.name: USB-C Charger
nodes.description: Manages charging of the LiPo battery via a USB-C input.

nodes.name: Optical Chamber Housing
nodes.description: Light-tight enclosure for the photodiode and LED array to ensure consistent readings.

nodes.name: MCU Mounting Tray
nodes.description: Snap-fit bracket for the ESP32-S3 controller board.

nodes.name: Home Switch Bracket
nodes.description: Adjustable mount for the home position limit switch.

nodes.name: End Switch Bracket
nodes.description: Adjustable mount for the end-of-travel limit switch.

nodes.name: M3 Hardware Pack
nodes.description: Various M3 screws for mounting motors, rails, and PCB supports.

nodes.name: M3 Heat-Set Inserts
nodes.description: Brass inserts for creating durable threads in 3D-printed parts.

nodes.name: LED Diffuser Plate
nodes.description: Diffuses the white LED array for uniform illumination of reagent pads.

nodes.name: UV-C Safety Shield
nodes.description: Protective internal shield to prevent UV-C leakage during sterilization.

nodes.name: Environmental Sensor Mount
nodes.description: Form-fitting cradle for the Environmental Sensor that holds the sensing surface in its rated orientation. Snap-fit retention so it can be removed for calibration without tools.

nodes.name: Ambient Light Sensor Mount
nodes.description: Form-fitting cradle for the Ambient Light Sensor that holds the sensing surface in its rated orientation. Snap-fit retention so it can be removed for calibration without tools.

nodes.name: Illumination LED Mount
nodes.description: Per-position bracket for the Illumination LED with M3 mounting holes matched to its bolt pattern. Rated for the actuator's continuous torque/load class.

nodes.name: UV-C Sterilization LED Mount
nodes.description: Per-position bracket for the UV-C Sterilization LED with M3 mounting holes matched to its bolt pattern. Rated for the actuator's continuous torque/load class.

nodes.name: Calibration Target
nodes.description: Highly Lambertian white reflectance standard for normalizing spectral sensor data.

nodes.name: RGB Color Sensor
nodes.description: High-accuracy RGB color sensor with IR filter and I2C interface for consistent color measurement.

nodes.name: RGB Sensor Mount
nodes.description: 3D-printed bracket to secure the TCS34725 sensor inside the optical chamber.

nodes.name: Secondary RGB Sensor
nodes.description: Second color sensor for differential or redundant reagent pad analysis.

nodes.name: GT2 Timing Belt
nodes.description: Rubber belt used to translate rotational motion of the DC motor into linear motion.

nodes.name: GT2 Pulley
nodes.description: Aluminum pulleys for the belt drive system.

nodes.name: Belt Tensioner
nodes.description: Adjustable mount to maintain proper tension on the timing belt.

nodes.name: 16-Bit ADC Module
nodes.description: High-precision 16-bit analog-to-digital converter to handle low-noise sensor data.

nodes.name: High-CRI Reference LED
nodes.description: Broad-spectrum white LED with high color rendering index for medical diagnostic accuracy.

nodes.name: Light Shield Shroud
nodes.description: An opaque gasket or shroud to seal the optical chamber against the dipstick surface.

nodes.name: Scan Start Button
nodes.description: Triggers the automated measurement sequence when pressed.

nodes.name: LED Control MOSFET
nodes.description: Allows MCU to control High-CRI LED intensity via PWM for calibration.

nodes.name: Main Controller S3
nodes.description: Powerful dual-core MCU with native USB and enough RAM for UI rendering.

nodes.name: Manufacturable Main Shell
nodes.description: Enclosure designed with 2-degree draft angles and uniform wall thickness for high-volume production.

nodes.name: Disposable Tray Liner
nodes.description: Pre-cut absorbent strips to be placed in the tray reservoir to soak up excess urine.

nodes.name: Clear Acrylic Guard
nodes.description: A low-friction clear plate that holds the dipstick flat against the tray as the optical head passes over.

nodes.name: Single-Strip Mini Tray
nodes.description: Compact tray designed with a single 6mm wide channel for a single reagent strip.

nodes.name: Compact Chassis Base
nodes.description: Redesigned chassis base with a smaller overall footprint and optimized mounting for the single-strip tray.

nodes.name: Thermal Receipt Printer
nodes.description: Integrated thermal printer for diagnostic reports.

nodes.name: Weight Sensor
nodes.description: Senses sample cup placement and volume verification.

nodes.name: 4.3in Capacitive Touch Display
nodes.description: Larger medical-grade capacitive touch interface.

nodes.name: N20 DC Gear Motor with Encoder
nodes.productName: GA12-N20 DC Gear Motor 6V 200RPM with Hall Encoder
nodes.description: Compact DC motor with integrated quadrature encoder for position feedback.

nodes.name: Mini H-Bridge Motor Driver
nodes.description: Small dual-channel H-bridge for controlling DC motor direction and speed.

nodes.name: N20 Motor Bracket
nodes.description: 3D-printed adapter to mount the N20 motor to the existing chassis base.

originalPrompt:
Urine Dipstick Analyzer
Automated diagnostic device uses an LED photo-diode to analyze urine reagent strips

subSteps.title: Print optical chamber components in black PLA
Print sensor and actuator mounts in PETG
Install heat-set inserts into optical chamber
Cut and prepare acrylic flattening guard and diffuser
Print chassis base and tray components
Connect LiPo battery to charging and regulation circuit
Solder I2C bus harness for sensors and ADC
Wire N20 motor and encoder to H-bridge driver
Connect high-power LEDs and MOSFET driver
Wire thermal printer and load cell to MCU
Connect display and start button to system controller
Verify power rail voltages (3.3V, 5V, 9V)
Scan I2C bus for all sensor addresses
Test motor movement and limit switch logic
Calibrate RGB sensors using white standard
Validate weight sensor and printer communication
Mount N20 motor and belt drive system to chassis
Assemble optical chamber with LEDs and sensors
Install strip tray and calibration target
Secure MCU tray and printer to housing
Install display and final enclosure shell
Final system test and liner placement

projectDescription: Automating reagent strip urinalysis, this device uses an ESP32-S3 and dual RGB sensors to perform colorimetric diagnostics within a light-shielded optical chamber. It features a motorized DC-driven tray, integrated UV-C sterilization, environmental compensation, and a thermal printer for immediate patient reporting.

tools: Heat-set insert installation tool (soldering iron tip)
assumptions: Access to a 3D printer for manufacturing structural components
Familiarity with ESP32-S3 firmware flashing and I2C debugging
Basic soldering skills for small-pitch modules
All 3D prints are cleaned and deburred prior to assembly
